The '''''Arrestor''''' was a [[Neutron Star-class bulk cruiser/Legends|''Neutron Star''-class bulk cruiser]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Starfleet]], under the command of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Winstel Greelanx]].

It was destroyed in [[4 BBY/Legends|4 BBY]] during the [[Battle of Nar Shaddaa (4 BBY)|Battle of Nar Shaddaa]] by [[Drea Renthal]]'s [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] ''[[Renthal's Fist]]''.

{{Ship-stub}}
